spec_match.rationale: Provides a scanning and hashing migration assistant tool mapping HTML text inputs directly to SRI tags and policy outputs.

interactive.rationale: Enables loading a sample page, scanning for missing scripts, dynamically appending generated SHA hashes on list items, and exporting the patched HTML block.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfect description of three-phase SRI rollouts using Integrity-Policy CSP-like parameters.

edge_cases.rationale: Appropriately handles stylesheet link tags as well as inline scripts, supporting various subresource types.

references.rationale: Lacks outbound links to either ChromeStatus 5178394056327168 or SRI spec guides.

design_system.rationale: Complies with all styling instructions, presenting clear stat cells and code cards with beautiful spacing.

openQuestions.title: Add ChromeStatus reference link
openQuestions.detail: According to repo conventions, every concept page must include a link to the ChromeStatus feature entry (https://chromestatus.com/feature/5178394056327168). Add it to the crumbs or details card.

openQuestions.title: Generate real hashes via Crypto API
openQuestions.detail: The assistant currently uses synthetic fake hashes. Using Web Crypto API (`crypto.subtle.digest`) to hash the content if fetching a resource is possible (or a text input box is supplied) would be a massive utility upgrade.

summary: An outstanding, high-fidelity scan helper that accurately structures SRI tag generation to ease Integrity-Policy adoption, though it lacks outbound specification links.
